scripts.name: pull_car_data.py
scripts.desc: Pulls CAR event study data from Bloomberg API

scripts.name: generate_bbg_excel.py
scripts.desc: Generates Bloomberg Excel queries for financial data

scripts.name: generate_splc_excel.py
scripts.desc: Generates Bloomberg supply-chain (SPLC) queries

scripts.name: run_edgar_fetch.py
scripts.desc: Fetches SEC EDGAR 10-K filings (MD&A + Risk Factors)

scripts.name: fix_dates.py
scripts.desc: Standardizes date formats across Bloomberg downloads

scripts.name: retry_failed_tickers.py
scripts.desc: Re-attempts failed ticker lookups with fuzzy matching

scripts.name: merge_bbg_data.py
scripts.desc: Merges multiple Bloomberg financial data files

scripts.name: merge_splc_data.py
scripts.desc: Merges and deduplicates supply chain relationship data

scripts.name: run_cleaning.py
scripts.desc: Master cleaning script: outliers, NaN, type casting

scripts.name: compute_car.py
scripts.desc: Computes Cumulative Abnormal Returns [-5,+5] window

scripts.name: run_text_features.py
scripts.desc: FinBERT encoding → PCA (64 dims) for MD&A and Risk Factors

scripts.name: build_hetero_graph.py
scripts.desc: Constructs heterogeneous supply-chain graph (PyG HeteroData)

scripts.name: train_hetero_graph.py
scripts.desc: Trains 2-layer HeteroGraphSAGE → 64-dim node embeddings

scripts.name: merge_hetero_embeddings.py
scripts.desc: Merges graph embeddings back into the deal-level dataset

scripts.name: build_combined_dataset.py
scripts.desc: Concatenates M1/M2/M3 feature matrices

scripts.name: train_ridge.py
scripts.desc: Ridge/ElasticNet regression baselines (5-fold CV)

scripts.name: train_xgboost.py
scripts.desc: XGBoost regression (M1/M2/M3, 5-fold CV)

scripts.name: train_mlp.py
scripts.desc: 2-layer MLP regressor (M1/M2/M3, 5-fold CV)

scripts.name: train_classifier.py
scripts.desc: Classification pipeline: LogReg/XGBoost/MLP with AUC

scripts.name: tune_xgboost.py
scripts.desc: Bayesian hyperparameter tuning (Optuna) for XGBoost classifier

scripts.name: test_h1.py
scripts.desc: H1: Graph embeddings help more in supply-chain sectors

scripts.name: test_h2.py
scripts.desc: H2: MD&A alignment → +CAR, Risk Factor concentration → −CAR

scripts.name: test_h3.py
scripts.desc: H3: High betweenness centrality → higher CAR variance

scripts.name: verify_car.py
scripts.desc: Cross-validates CAR calculations against Bloomberg benchmarks
